claim: GO-P-2026-026 follow-up (EXPLORATORY, not pre-registered): the Appendix-E omission floor bites downstream on trained Llama attention as an asymptotic (infinite read-rate) phenomenon.
context: Resolves NEG-13: the sealed finite-rate gate missed because its rate sweep was too shallow to reach the plateau; the downstream floor exists.
method: Per head: P=Q^T Q/n, Sx=Cov(K), P_hat=projector onto top-16 eigvecs of P (rank-16 truncation). Floor covariance = Sx^{1/2} Pi Sx^{1/2}, Pi = whitened kernel of P_hat. kl_floor = softmax-KL under error ~ N(0, floor cov) (infinite read-rate limit); kl_correct = softmax-KL under ~0 error.
note: EXPLORATORY (post-hoc, not sealed). To claim [demonstrated], seal the asymptotic-floor gate as GO-P-2026-027 and re-run prospectively. Synthetic transfer map: experiments/explore_mismatch_limits.py.
